message:
fix(doctor): remove 3307 fallback in test port helpers

doctorTestServerPort() and fixTestServerPort() returned 3307 (production
port) when BEADS_DOLT_PORT was unset. Now returns 0 so tests fail safely
and get skipped instead of accidentally hitting a production Dolt server.

Both packages already have TestMain that starts isolated test servers and
sets BEADS_DOLT_PORT, so the fallback only triggers when dolt is unavailable.

Closes: bd--t45w

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
